title: poa macrocalyx subsp. koriakiensis
intro: Poa macrocalyx subsp. koriakiensis, also known as Koriaki Poa or Koriaki meadow grass, is a subspecies of grass native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and reduce oxidative stress. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
